chapter_title.en: The Obligation of the jumu’ah Prayer, Its Virtue, Who is Exempt From it, and the Prayer and Sermon Therein

text: 1241 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّهُ مَا طَلَعَتِ اَلشَّمْسُ فِي يَوْمٍ أَفْضَلَ مِنْ يَوْمِ اَلْجُمُعَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1241 - It has been narrated: "There is no day on which the sun rises that is better than Jumu’ah."
